name: codexspin
description: Parallel Codex session management for Claude Code: delegation, native session transfer, and background-job visibility.

plugins.name: codexspin
plugins.description: Codex delegation skill, native Claude-to-Codex session transfer with visible history, and session-start visibility for background jobs. Requires codexspin CLI 0.2.0+ (brew install yogevkr/tap/codexspin).
